trans-unit.source: Not a member? Please contact your System Administrator
trans-unit.target: Not a member? Please contact your System Administrator

trans-unit.source: The username or password you entered is incorrect.
trans-unit.target: The username or password you entered is incorrect.

trans-unit.source: Please delete install folder before you login.
trans-unit.target: Please delete install folder before you login.

trans-unit.source: Click here to start the Security setup wizard
trans-unit.target: Click here to start the Security setup wizard

trans-unit.source: Click here to start the Workflow setup wizard
trans-unit.target: Click here to start the Workflow setup wizard

trans-unit.source: Summary of the status of your system.
trans-unit.target: Summary of the status of your system.

trans-unit.source: Check billing tab for new invoices
trans-unit.target: Check billing tab for new invoices

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete this reviewer?
trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to delete this reviewer?

trans-unit.source: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
trans-unit.target: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

trans-unit.source: List of all users who have signed up
trans-unit.target: List of all users who have signed up

trans-unit.source: Report of all applications that have been submitted within a specified time period and their status
trans-unit.target: Report of all applications that have been submitted within a specified time period and their status

trans-unit.source: Report of all applications that have been approved within a specific time period and their status
trans-unit.target: Report of all applications that have been approved within a specific time period and their status

trans-unit.source: Report of all applications that are pending at a particular stage of the workflow
trans-unit.target: Report of all applications that are pending at a particular stage of the workflow

trans-unit.source: Report of all applications that have exceeded their designated time limit within the various workflow stages
trans-unit.target: Report of all applications that have exceeded their designated time limit within the various workflow stages

trans-unit.source: Report of all applications pending action from the requestor (developer/architect)
trans-unit.target: Report of all applications pending action from the requester (developer/architect)

trans-unit.source: Report of all notifications for an application that have been sent
trans-unit.target: Report of all notifications for an application that have been sent

trans-unit.source: Report of all inspection carried out by a specific reviewer
trans-unit.target: Report of all inspection carried out by a specific reviewer

trans-unit.source: Report of all activities with a certain period of time
trans-unit.target: Report of all activities with a certain period of time

trans-unit.source: Your form has no fields yet
trans-unit.target: Your form has no fields yet

trans-unit.source: Click the buttons on the right sidebar or Drag it here to add new field
trans-unit.target: Click the buttons on the right sidebar or Drag it here to add new field

trans-unit.source: Click on a field on the left to change its properties
trans-unit.target: Click on a field on the left to change its properties

trans-unit.source: Field to use as Option Value
trans-unit.target: Field to use as Option Value

trans-unit.source: Field to use as Option Name
trans-unit.target: Field to use as Option Name

trans-unit.source: (Remember to set the field to use as option value to 'optionvalue' and the field to use as option name to 'optionname' e.g. SELECT zone_id AS optionvalue, zone_name AS optionname FROM zones)
trans-unit.target: (Remember to set the field to use as option value to

trans-unit.source: Limit each file to a maximum
trans-unit.target: Limit each file to a maximum

trans-unit.source: Allow Clients to Save and Resume Later
trans-unit.target: Allow Clients to Save and Resume Later

trans-unit.source: Our apologies, we're unable to reach the server
Please try again within few minutes
trans-unit.target: Please try again within few minutes

trans-unit.source: If the problem persist, please contact us and we'll get back to you immediately
trans-unit.target: If the problem persist, please contact us and we

trans-unit.source: All data collected by the field will be deleted as well
trans-unit.target: All data collected by the field will be deleted as well

trans-unit.source: If you are sure with this, you can continue deleting this field
trans-unit.target: If you are sure with this, you can continue deleting this field

trans-unit.source: You can insert a list of choices here. Separate the choices with new line
trans-unit.target: You can insert a list of choices here. Separate the choices with new line

trans-unit.source: You can insert a list of rows here. Separate the rows with new line
trans-unit.target: You can insert a list of rows here. Separate the rows with new line

trans-unit.source: You can insert a list of rows here. Separate the rows with new line
trans-unit.target: You can insert a list of rows here. Separate the rows with new line

trans-unit.source: Define conditions and actions for your form fields, pages or notification emails
trans-unit.target: Define conditions and actions for your form fields, pages or notification emails

trans-unit.source: Enable Rules to Send Notification Emails
trans-unit.target: Enable Rules to Send Notification Emails

trans-unit.source: You need to add one or more pages into your form
trans-unit.target: You need to add one or more pages into your form

trans-unit.source: Send Email in Plain Text Format
trans-unit.target: Send Email in Plain Text Format

trans-unit.source: You can insert template variables into the email template
trans-unit.target: You can insert template variables into the email template

trans-unit.source: A template variable is a special identifier that is automatically replaced with data typed in by a user
trans-unit.target: A template variable is a special identifier that is automatically replaced with data typed in by a user

trans-unit.source: Simply copy the variable name (including curly braces) into your email template
trans-unit.target: Simply copy the variable name (including curly braces) into your email template

trans-unit.source: You can insert template variable into Email Subject and Email Content
trans-unit.target: You can insert template variable into Email Subject and Email Content

trans-unit.source: Changes have already taken effect. Return to dashboard to continue with other configuration wizards
trans-unit.target: Changes have already taken effect. Return to dashboard to continue with other configuration wizards

trans-unit.source: OR Choose an action from below
trans-unit.target: OR Choose an action from below

trans-unit.source: Select Submenu if above action requires moving along workflow
trans-unit.target: Select Submenu if above action requires moving along workflow

trans-unit.source: Move to Next Stage as Declined
trans-unit.target: Move to Next Stage as Declined

trans-unit.source: Move to Previous Stage as Declined
trans-unit.target: Move to Previous Stage as Declined

trans-unit.source: Move to Next Stage as Approved
trans-unit.target: Move to Next Stage as Approved

trans-unit.source: Stage at which this permit is generated
trans-unit.target: Stage at which this permit is generated

trans-unit.source: Edit, share and publish your form report
trans-unit.target: Edit, share and publish your form report

trans-unit.source: Add widgets to your report by clicking the button above
trans-unit.target: Add widgets to your report by clicking the button above

trans-unit.source: Select the form field you want the widget to be based on
trans-unit.target: Select the form field you want the widget to be based on

trans-unit.source: A new widget has been added
trans-unit.target: A new widget has been added

trans-unit.source: This is your first time. Please configure your system.
trans-unit.target: This is your first time. Please configure your system.

trans-unit.source: Report that uses the date and time fields in an application form to create a schedule for submitted applications
trans-unit.target: Report that uses the date and time fields in an application form to create a schedule for submitted applicationsر

trans-unit.source: Report of all applications within a time period filtered by a dropdown
trans-unit.target: Report of all applications within a time period filtered by a dropdown

trans-unit.source: Report of all applications pending action from the client e.g. declined applications that need to be resubmitted or invoices that need payment
trans-unit.target: Report of all applications pending action from the client e.g. declined applications that need to be resubmitted or invoices that need payment

trans-unit.source: This report gives details per transaction processed by PSPs. The users should be able to query the report based on the following criteria
trans-unit.target: This report gives details per transaction processed by PSPs. The users should be able to query the report based on the following criteria

trans-unit.source: The report will be used for remittances to MDA banks. It should aggregate all transactions per service code. The users should be able to query the report based on the following criteria
trans-unit.target: The report will be used for remittances to MDA banks. It should aggregate all transactions per service code. The users should be able to query the report based on the following criteria

trans-unit.source: Uploads Web URL (e.g. http://fileserver/). Must end with a trailing slash /
trans-unit.target: Uploads Web URL (e.g. http://fileserver/). Must end with a trailing slash /

trans-unit.source: Data Web URL (e.g. http://fileserver/). Must end with a trailing slash /
trans-unit.target: Data Web URL (e.g. http://fileserver/). Must end with a trailing slash /
